name: New Target Mining Corp.
summary: New Target Mining Corp., an exploration stage junior mining company, engages in the identification, acquisition, and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. It has an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Scarlett gold property that consists of ten mining claims covering an area of approximately 1,473.23 hectares land located in British Columbia. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
